title: Microarray analysis of Quail Embryo Pharyngeal Pouch Endoderm
author: Neves, Hélia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Anterior endoderm region was isolated from Coturnix japonica embryos at qE3 and 2PP and 3/4PP endoderm separated from central pharynx. Total RNA was isolated from two biological replicate of 2PP and 3/4PP endoderm samples. Transcription profiles were obtained using GeneChip® Chicken Genome Array.
steps_raw: Anterior endoderm region was isolated from Coturnix japonica embryos at qE3 and 2PP and 3/4PP endoderm separated from central pharynx. Total RNA was isolated from two biological replicate of 2PP and 3/4PP endoderm samples. Transcription profiles were obtained using GeneChip® Chicken Genome Array.
